top_signals.title: M&S Expects Profit Boost as Retailer Moves On From Cyber Hit
top_signals.summary: Marks & Spencer Group Plc expects annual profit to exceed the level seen before the British fashion and food chain was knocked off course by a cyberattack last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
